title: {{name}}'s Unicorn Quest
intro: Gallop into a sparkling meadow, {{name}} — unicorns love curious minds who practise carefully.

activities.title: Rainbow Number Trail
activities.instructions: Follow the unicorn's rainbow trail and keep count of every hoofprint.
activities.prompt: The unicorn left 12 hoofprints, then took 4 away with a magic erase. How many hoofprints remain? Show your working.
activities.answerSpaceHint: Show taking away, then write the answer.
activities.illustrationHint: A pastel unicorn beside a rainbow arc

activities.title: Magic Sentence Sparkles
activities.instructions: Unicorns only grant wishes written as proper sentences.
activities.prompt: Write a sentence wishing for something kind. Start with a capital letter and end with a full stop.
activities.illustrationHint: Stars and a unicorn horn motif in the margin

closingNote: The unicorn bows — {{name}} practised with courage today.
